questions.question: What is the primary time-saving benefit of AI-generated prospect briefs?

options.text: They eliminate the need for personalization
They reduce research time from 25 minutes to 3 minutes per prospect
They automate the entire outreach process

questions.explanation: AI briefs reduce research time by 70-80%, from 25-30 minutes of manual research to 3-5 minutes of AI-assisted research and review.

questions.question: What does the 'F' in the FRESH framework stand for?
questions.explanation: FRESH = Funding, Recent role change, Engagement, Shared connections, Hiring. These are timing signals that make outreach more relevant.

questions.question: According to the 20-50-30 rule, what percentage of prospects should get a full AI brief with manual review?
questions.explanation: Top 20% with highest FRESH scores get full briefs (10-15 min), middle 50% get AI-only briefs (3-5 min), bottom 30% get template personalization (1-2 min).

questions.question: What is the recommended batch size for weekly brief generation?
questions.explanation: 10-25 briefs per week in a single 60-90 minute batch session is the sweet spot for solo founders with 5-7 hours/week on acquisition.

questions.question: When should you regenerate a prospect brief?

options.text: After 60+ days if you haven't reached out yet
Only if the prospect changes companies

questions.explanation: Briefs go stale after 60+ days. Recent posts, company news, and timing signals change, so regenerate before reaching out to old prospects.

questions.question: Which of these is a HIGH FRESH score signal?

options.text: Prospect posted yesterday about a relevant pain point
Prospect works at a large company
Prospect has a complete LinkedIn profile

questions.explanation: Recent content engagement is a FRESH signal (the 'E' in FRESH). Experience level and company size are background context, not timing signals.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the 'Outreach Angle' section in a prospect brief?

options.text: To list all possible connection points
To provide a recommended approach for first contact
To summarize the prospect's career history

questions.explanation: The Outreach Angle section recommends a specific approach based on FRESH signals and connection points — it's the actionable conclusion of the brief.

questions.question: How many connection points should a quality brief include?
questions.explanation: 3-5 connection points support multi-touch sequences (each touch uses a different point). More than 5 is overkill; fewer than 3 limits your options.
